HOW IT WORKS

Teach. Explain. Reinforce. Retain.

The AI is assigned a topic and acts like a student with partial understanding. You teach the concept in your own words, while the AI asks clarifying questions, introduces misconceptions, and tests your understanding. At the end, it evaluates your explanation and gives feedback.

AI "student mode" with intentional confusion.

The AI acts as a confused learner that asks questions, makes mistakes, and challenges explanations — forcing you to actively teach and clarify concepts for deeper understanding.

Conversational learning with real-time feedback.

Natural, conversational learning flow — similar to explaining a topic to a real person. The AI evaluates your teaching quality and provides personalized feedback on the spot.

WHY IT WORKS

Personalized difficulty adjustment.

The AI adapts to your responses, adjusting the level of challenge. Most learning apps focus on memorization — TeachLoop flips the model by making you the teacher for deeper retention.

See learning principles →

Key features.

AI STUDENT MODE

Teach an AI that asks questions

The AI acts like a confused learner — asking clarifying questions, making mistakes, and challenging your explanations to deepen your understanding.

REAL-TIME FEEDBACK

Get evaluated as you teach

After each explanation, the AI evaluates your teaching quality and gives personalized feedback to improve your understanding and retention.

VOICE & TEXT

Conversational learning

Learn through natural conversation via voice or text. A natural, flowing experience similar to explaining a topic to a real person.

Ready to transform the way you learn?

TeachLoop transforms studying from passive learning into active teaching — making education more engaging, interactive, and effective.
